title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PhonePe South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at PhonePe South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
